name.en: Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon of the Four Heavenly Dragons
name.ja: <ruby>四<rt>し</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt>てん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>龍<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby> ダーク・リベリオン・エクシーズ・ドラゴン
name.ja_romaji: Shiten no Ryū Dāku Riberion Ekushīzu Doragon
name.zh-CN: 四天之龙 暗反叛超量龙

text.en:
2 Level 4 DARK monsters
(This card is always treated as a "The Phantom Knights" card.)
If this card is Special Summoned: You can target an equal number of cards on each field; destroy them. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon 1 Rank 4 DARK Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, using this card you control (this is treated as an Xyz Summon, transfer this card's materials). You can only use each effect of "Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon of the Four Heavenly Dragons" once per turn.
